prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为6757→6337→6768→7360→6231，整体波动较大，2025年基准位次约6231名，近两年呈先降后升的震荡走势；该校在陕西理科（物理类）招生计划2021年67人、2022年75人、2023年77人、2024年78人、2025年73人；2026年计划大幅扩招至103人，较2025年增加30人（+41.1%），扩招幅度显著，将明显缓解竞争压力，推动最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第34名，近年排名稳定在第33–34位，属于中上985层次，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因为实验室爆炸事故（1名学生死亡、3人受伤），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微负面影响；抖音热度评价为较热（总排名第23位），综合热度约193万，关注度中等偏上；近5年无显著投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程A+、机械工程A-、环境科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、风景园林A-，共5个A-及以上学科；电气工程、机械工程等工科优势突出，与招生专业中的工科试验班（电气信息类、工程能源类等）高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类为2026年高热推荐专业，与重庆大学工科试验班（电气信息类、计算机与智能软件类）高度契合，有利于吸引高分考生；土木建筑持续明显劝退，可能影响相关专业组热度；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约34032人（+19.7%），考生规模大幅增长将加剧整体竞争；重庆大学位于重庆市，与陕西省地理相邻，交通便利，地域接受度较高；该校在陕西招生规模较大（2026年物理类103人），属于在陕招生较多的外省985之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次6231名、2026年物理类计划大幅扩招41.1%（显著缓解竞争）、陕西省物理类考生增加19.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉负面事件轻微影响报考热度等因素，扩招效应大于考生增幅，预计2026年最低位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约7797名，区间7297–8297名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 6757 → 6337 → 6768 → 7360 → 6231, showing significant fluctuations overall. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6231, with a fluctuating trend of decline followed by rise in recent two years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Shaanxi was 67 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 73 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 103, an increase of 30 (+41.1%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will notably ease competition pressure, pushing the minimum ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 34th, with stable rankings around 33–34 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities with strong comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident (1 student death, 3 injuries), which may have a minor negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. The Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot (ranked 23rd overall), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.93 million, indicating moderate to high attention. There have been no significant admission gaps in the past 5 years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 5 A- or above disciplines: Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Landscape Architecture A-. Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and other engineering disciplines have prominent advantages, highly corresponding to the engineering experimental classes (Electrical and Information, Engineering and Energy, etc.) in the admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are highly recommended majors for 2026, highly aligned with Chongqing University's engineering experimental classes (Electrical and Information, Computer and Intelligent Software), which helps attract high-scoring candidates. Civil engineering continues to be significantly discouraged, potentially affecting the popularity of related major groups. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 34,032 (+19.7%) compared to 172,468 in 2025. This substantial growth in candidate numbers will intensify overall competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Shaanxi Province, with convenient transportation and high regional acceptance. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Shaanxi (103 in physics category in 2026), making it one of the out-of-province 985 universities with higher enrollment in Shaanxi.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6231, the significant 41.1% expansion in the 2026 physics category plan (notably easing competition), the 19.7% increase in Shaanxi physics category candidates (intensifying competition), and the minor negative impact of reputation incidents on application popularity, the expansion effect outweighs the candidate increase. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7797, with a range of 7297–8297.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software) (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Communication Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Vehicle Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Foundation) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials) (Energy and Power Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical Engineering Cross and Environmental Chemistry Health) (Biomedical Engineering, Pharmacy, Environmental Engineering, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart City and Infrastructure) (Civil Engineering, Intelligent Construction, etc.)
- Architecture Class (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7297–8297, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<7297), focus on stretching for top majors like the Excellence Plan and Electrical Engineering and Automation. For rankings near the upper limit of the range (>8000), use Tier 3 majors as safety, while also paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 768 → 792 → 818 → 853 → 772, showing a slow backward trend overall. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 772, with small fluctuations over the past five years. The enrollment plan for this university in Shaanxi's liberal arts (history category) was 10 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 4 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 8 students, doubling (+100%) compared to 2025, a substantial expansion that will significantly ease competition and push the minimum ranking noticeably backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 34th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 985 universities with strong overall strength. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion incident, which may have a minor negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. The Douyin popularity evaluation is relatively hot (ranked 23rd overall). There have been no significant admission gaps in the past five years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, civil engineering received A+, mechanical engineering A-, environmental science and engineering A-, electrical engineering A-, and landscape architecture A-. The liberal arts enrollment majors (law and journalism, Chinese language and literature, English) did not receive A- or above ratings in their corresponding disciplines, but the university's strong engineering background has limited impact on liberal arts candidates' application decisions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is relatively hot but with divided opinions, Chinese language and literature is recommended, and foreign languages are generally watched with caution. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 12,859 (+17%) from 75,641 in 2025, which will intensify competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, adjacent to Shaanxi with convenient transportation. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Shaanxi is small (8 students in 2026), but after doubling, it is still at a normal level for an out-of-province 985 university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 772, the doubling of the 2026 history category enrollment plan (+100%, greatly easing competition), the 17% increase in Shaanxi history category candidates (intensifying competition), and the minor negative impact of reputation incidents, the expansion effect far outweighs the candidate increase. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1255, with a range of 1067 to 1443.
